recommendations.title: The Amateur
recommendations.overview: After his life is turned upside down when his wife is killed in a London terrorist attack, a brilliant but introverted CIA decoder takes matters into his own hands when his supervisors refuse to take action.

recommendations.title: MR-9: Do or Die
recommendations.overview: Elite Bangladeshi CIA agent Masud Rana – codename MR-9 – teams up with an American CIA operative to bring down an international criminal organization headed by a ruthless businessman.

recommendations.title: Jason Bourne
recommendations.overview: The most dangerous former operative of the CIA is drawn out of hiding to uncover hidden truths about his past.

recommendations.title: Mia and the White Lion
recommendations.overview: A young girl from London moves to Africa with her parents where she befriends a lion cub.

recommendations.title: Man on Fire
recommendations.overview: Jaded ex-CIA operative John Creasy reluctantly accepts a job as the bodyguard for a 10-year-old girl in Mexico City. They clash at first, but eventually bond, and when she's kidnapped he's consumed by fury and will stop at nothing to save her life.

recommendations.title: All the Devil's Men
recommendations.overview: A battle-scarred War on Terror bounty hunter is forced to go to London on a manhunt for a disavowed CIA operative, which leads him into a deadly running battle with a former military comrade and his private army.

recommendations.title: My Spy
recommendations.overview: A hardened CIA operative finds himself at the mercy of a precocious 9-year-old girl, having been sent undercover to surveil her family.

recommendations.title: Extortion
recommendations.overview: A doctor desperately tries to save his wife and their 5 year old son after their vacation in the Bahamas takes an unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: Tiger Zinda Hai
recommendations.overview: When a group of Indian and Pakistani nurses are held hostage in Iraq by a terrorist organization, a renowned Indian secret agent is drawn out of hiding to rescue them.

recommendations.title: Unlocked
recommendations.overview: After failing to apprehend the terrorist behind a Paris attack that claimed dozens of lives, CIA agent Alice Racine is forced to live in London as a caseworker. Her mentor unexpectedly calls her back into action when the CIA discovers that another at
